creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
On head,  dns/hs-gnuidn and graphics/hs-cairo fail to build:

http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64-default-PR216707/2017-03-19_21h56m34s/logs/errors/hs-gnuidn-0.2.1_3.log
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64-default-PR216707/2017-03-19_21h56m34s/logs/errors/hs-cairo-0.13.1.0.log

tcberner@ submitted patch at https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/fix_hs-gnuidn_and_hs-cairo_with_modern_gcc.v1.patch
